testcase.name: test_tunnel_status_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:36: in test_tunnel_status_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 503 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_email_preview_different_templates
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:87: in test_email_preview_different_templates assert response.status_code == 200, f"Template '{template}' returned {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Template 'payment' returned 503 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_health_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'status' key assert 'status' in {'error': 'Backend starting, please retry'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:99: in test_health_endpoint assert "status" in data, "Missing 'status' key" E AssertionError: Missing 'status' key E assert 'status' in {'error': 'Backend starting, please retry'}
